entry.title: Re: Material Standard Cost Estimate (CO-PC-PCP)
entry.content: Excellent information... many thabks...!

entry.title: Re: Cannot read entities during delete operation of child entity in ABAP RAP (MANAGED DRAFT)
entry.content: Was there any solution or work around to this?

entry.title: Email notification trigger to internal requestor when PO change via background job
entry.content:
Hello Guru,

We have built a program in SAP ECC to close SRM POs. When users close the SRM PO via a background job, an email notification is triggered and sent to the requestor. This issue only occurs when the PO is closed using a background job. Has anyone else experienced this issue before? How can we prevent the email notification from being triggered when the PO is closed via a background job?

entry.title: Re: unable to see in HTML5 Application in SAP BTP COCKPIT...
entry.content:
I created a new MTA with app, srv , db and deployed to CF and can see the app in html5 app repository and even successfully added the same to launchpad site space and page


When i display the data locally in CAPM service using "cds w" it is allowing me to get(display) and post the data in the sandbox fiori.
But when I try to get the data by selecting the html5 app or directly from launchpad, getting internal server error (500) for metadata and service.

 

 

all my Xsapp.json , xs-security.json , mta.yaml and manifest. Json are configured for xsuaa token exchange with added role collection in BTP

entry.title: Impact of using Script Recording and Playback during the invoice posting process
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert

I would like to inquire whether using Script Recording and Playback during the invoice posting process (e.g., in transaction FB60 or MIRO) has any potential impact on system performance, data accuracy, or compliance.

We are considering using this tool to streamline repetitive tasks, and would like to ensure that:

  • No unintended data is recorded or posted.

  • There are no audit or control concerns.

  • It is acceptable from a policy or compliance standpoint.

Could you please advise if there are any risks or best practices we should be aware of?

 

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Re: Create Billing Plan for a Sales Order Item through a...
entry.content: Some of the other Function Modules related to Billing Plan are

entry.title: Ship From determination when creating new sales order via COPY
entry.content:
Dear SAP


Usually our user via copy button to create a new SO,
but they found there is a different result between some SO.
for example : select SO:DIGITS to copy it and get a new SO, in SO item there is a field name is Ship-From, in new SO this field value is blank ,it can not be successfully be copy from old SO,
but if select SO:DIGITS to copy it and get a new SO, in new SO that field value can be sucessfully copy from old SO.
can you tell why some SO is ok in that field ,but some SO can not?



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Ship From determination when creating new sales order...
entry.content:
Dear requester:

The ship from determination in the new sales order from COPY scenario depends on the ship from value in the original sales order.

When you copy a sales order, only the Ship From locations entered manually would be copied. In this case, Ship From locations was determined through ATP and hence when you copy the sales order, the Ship From will not be determined automatically.

It is the current designed behavior.

You can get the additional information from KBA:  3050552 - Ship-From field in the line item is blank when you copy a Sales Order

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ User Report
entry.content: Report Module is still available in Quote 2.0. Regarding database structure, for users table there is no change in structure, the change of database structure applies to anything that is Quote object related.

entry.title: Recover the original version of the standard content after it was overwritten in SAP
entry.content:
Dear All, 

 

There is standard IFP business content available in the public folder of SAP SAC . I had reimported this content, but I selected the 'Import' option with overwrite enabled, which replaced the existing content. Now, I want to retrieve the previous version. How can I recover the original content in which I have made changes

entry.title: Re: 🔄 Mapping Pricing Conditions from SAP CPS to SAP CPQ and Back to S/4HANA Sales Documents
entry.content:
@akhilesh595 

Setting up in CPQ - Pricing - Pricing Procedures needs to maintained for both Stateless and Document Pricing.  

  • Its mapping between CPS and CPQ [QISF or QICF] (updating Condition Types - Prices from CPS to CPQ)
  • Its mapping between CPQ - S/4 or ERP used in CPI Iflows (updating pricing items for Sales Order or Solution Quotation or Solution Order)

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023, Fully-Activated Appliance on Google Cloud
entry.content: Any advise here 🙏

entry.title: Re: Value Mismatch in Order and Invoice value due deliver...
entry.content: Not sure, whether the condition type is set to Header or Item level and Group condition box is ticked. Normally, Fixed Amount condition types, during copying, will be adjusted on a quantity basis. Having said that, they multiply with the quotient of old and new quantities. So you need to ensure quantity split will not happen in delivery. If that is not possible, then, you can explore on custom validation to avoid this

entry.title: Re: Connect to MSSQL Database from SAP BTP CAPM application
entry.content:
Hi @Pmayank ,

I have the same issue trying to reach the server of the SQL Server configured in the cloud conector using the mssql library for nodejs.

Did you configure anything else apart of binding the connectivity servíce to the cap project?

Seems that the project is not able to resolve the virtual host and virtual port configured in cloud conector.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Recover the original version of the standard content...
entry.content:
Hi,

Re-import the standard IFP content from the Public Content Network in SAC again. Go to Browse > Content Network > Business Content, search for the IFP package, and import it without selecting "overwrite" to restore the original version.

Tip: SAC does not support version history or rollback for overwritten content—reimporting is the only recovery method.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: 🌟 Community Spotlight: Our Top Contributors May 2025 🌟
entry.content: That's great to celebrate engagement, but three out of 17 community members you mentioned are SAP employees. Maybe separate SAP and non SAP employees?

entry.title: Re: issue Inventory posting diapi
entry.content: You have inserted your issue in an old discussion and it will not get the required attention.  Create a new discussion, detailing what the issue is with related screen shots, what analysis you made so that members will assist you

entry.title: Re: Extract country-wise holiday lists from open websites...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use Python with BeautifulSoup or Selenium for web scraping holiday data. Transform it using Pandas, then load it into SAP BW via flat files, ODP, or BAPI. Use APIs (like Calendarific or Nager.Date) if available—they're cleaner than scraping.

Tip: Automate the process using scheduled scripts + BW process chains for regular updates.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023, Fully-Activated Appliance on Google...
entry.content:
Hi @budi 

The FPS03 deployment error is likely due to a software-specific issue, not your Google Cloud setup. Check SAP CAL logs for details, reattempt deployment, and ensure FPS03 is supported for your region. If it persists, refer to SAP Notes or raise a support ticket with SAP CAL.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Ship From determination when creating new sales order...
entry.content:
Hi  

The Ship-From field may not copy due to differences in item category, copy control settings (VTAA), or missing shipping data in the source SO. Check and align the copy control config, shipping point determination, and custom logic (user exits/BADIs) to ensure consistency.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Recommended Approach for Check Printing in SAP S/4HAN...
entry.content:
Yes, SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud supports check printing and Positive Pay via Output Management and Integration with cloud-based banking platforms.

  • Use 'Manage Automatic Payments' app to generate checks.

  • Configure Output Parameter Determination for check formats (e.g., MICR).

  • For Positive Pay, use Advanced Bank Statement Processing or integrate via SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity

  • For secure check number assignment and remittance, use Payment Medium Workbench (PMW) templates.

Third-party tools like Bottomline or Esker are also commonly integrated for enhanced check processing.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required – Agent-on-Fly Configuration for...
entry.content: Hi Srinivas, since parameter SAPDBHOST has been maintained with value "INCECCDBGRP1, 1433", it's normal to see it in the LMDB. Instance profile parameters are the SLD source. Please see Note 1052122 - Host names in SLD and LMDB. It's suggested a case on SV-SMG-MON-SYS to resolve the errors in SLG1. Community is ideal for the simple how to questions. This question is more complicated and better to be answered via a case. Thank you. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: How to create a Dropdown List Variable to prefilter a...
entry.content:
Hi @JacobS ,

Use this query:

sql
SELECT T0.ItemCode, T0.OnHand FROM OITM T0 WHERE (UPPER('[%0]') = 'ALL') OR (UPPER('[%0]') = 'POS' AND T0.OnHand > 0) OR (UPPER('[%0]') = 'NEG' AND T0.OnHand < 0) OR (UPPER('[%0]') = 'ZERO' AND T0.OnHand = 0)

Let users manually type ALL, POS, NEG, or ZERO at runtime—SAP B1 doesn't support dropdowns in query parameters.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Vacation Post Challenge
entry.content: Last november, we visited Doha in Katar and it was one of the most impressive and cleanest cities I've ever seen.

entry.title: Re: S4 Hana Cloud - Custom Field Status Group not allowed to Delete.
entry.content: Hello Together, according to the field Status - is there a overview i can show my customer to explain which Field Status group is doing what? Same for the functional Groups

entry.title: Re: I want to create a button that will sort a dimension...
entry.content:
Hello @peersbrennanctb,

You can achieve this with API sortByValue. Here an example based on BW live connection:

Table_1.sortByValue({[Alias.MeasureDimension]:"00O2TM15XD8XM22WI2SLFCF89"},SortOrder.Descending,Direction.Vertical);

Value in "" is ID of measure.

Best regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: Scenario Datasphere and SAC Story, dynamic valuelist...
entry.content: hi Martin, i use advanced story and not an Application. Shoud i still us application ? what about the warning => Classic Design Experience Deprecation Warning?

entry.title: Re: SAP Open Course: Unit Testing: Week 6: Working with Existing Code
entry.content:
I'd just like to point out that ABAP OO came out in 4.0 not 4.6. Yes it was very "beta",  you even had to call the constructor of a class explicitly and the Enjoy controls didn't exist but it was there.
Anyway it's now 2025 so it's doubtful Paul will see this comment 🙂

entry.title: Re: Value Mismatch in Order and Invoice value due deliver...
entry.content: Condition type is set as item condition only, Group condition is untick,

entry.title: Re: I would like to clarify a few questions I have regard...
entry.content:
Hello Davi3,

"Question:
Is it possible to schedule a job to automate the creation of transport requests?"

No, this is not possible, from a Cloud ALM Feature you need to manually trigger the creation of a Tranport 

"Question:
Is it possible to filter features based on transport requests?"

Yes, you can do this with Transport Analysis app, you can search by a transport number for example and you get the feature where the transport is assigned and

"Question:
Is it possible to assign an Owner to a feature's transport request via SAP Cloud ALM?"

During the creation of a Transport from a Feature the owner is a mandatory field, if later on you need to make changes to the owner of the transport or to the owner of the task you need to do this in the development system.

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: Re: How to monitor AIF errors in delta way from SAP Solma...
entry.content:
Hi Vivek,

The AIF can be monitored in the Solution Manager system Interface Monitoring function. Detailed information is in SAP AIF Channel. However, only the total number is supported. It doesn't support to collect the latest hour data or define the other filter.

Focused Run system also supports to collect the AIF. Please see SAP AIF.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Billing Calculation from SD Credit Memo to be process...
entry.content:
Hi Ani, a common scenario is that you create a credit memo with reference to a billing document. You can use this to update the contractual value of the revenue contract created from the initial sales order. For this please check the settings in Sales and Distribution -> Revenue Accounting and Reporting -> Maintain Revenue Accounting Item Settings.    From the in system assistance. 

Revenue Accounting: Type

Revenue accounting-relevant sales document item types

Use

You may select from these sales document categories as relevant for revenue accounting: sales orders, sales contracts, scheduling agreements, and credit or debit memo requests.

The relevant types are

  • Not relevant
    No integration with revenue accounting; no RAIs are created
  • Relevant for Revenue Accounting
    A sales document item is processed in revenue accounting and an RAI and POB are created. The follow-on documents, Outbound Delivery and Billing Document, are relevant for revenue accounting and RAIs are created for them.
  • Credit or Debit Memo Request with Predecessor
    This setting is intended for credit or debit memo requests with a reference to a revenue accounting-relevant sales order or sales contract item. No RAI is created for the memo request but subsequent billing documents are revenue accounting-relevant and RAIs are created for them. These RAIs update the POB created for the memo request predecessor.
    If the memo request doesn't reference a revenue accounting-relevant predecessor, the relevant type is set for the memo request but follow-on billing documents won't create RAIs.

Rgds, Volkmar

SAP S/4HANA Product Management

entry.title: 统驭科目记账屏幕放出利润中心/自定义字段
entry.content:
我们公司有些板块，只上总账模块，不上销售和采购模块，但客户/供应商类统驭科目需要按利润中心的维度核算，

1、系统是否可以在APP：创建进项发票、创建销项发票，客商页签增加利润中心维度。

2、在创建客户/供应商凭证API的时候，也能相应的做增加？

3、如果利润中心字段不允许的话，自定义字段是否可以？

entry.title: Re: How to send list of open incidents to list of email a...
entry.content:
Hello TridentLtd, 
There is no option in the standard to  send list of open incidents to a list of email addresses through SolMan. I can think in using the code that fills the sm_crm incident search and send the output via e-mail.

Best regards,

Dolores

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps/Process Automation: "Workflow Definiti...
entry.content: Hi， please check note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003616034， it may help you solve the issue. Cherry

entry.title: Mass maintenance of MBEW - STPRS
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to change MBEW - STPRS for all materials in bulk. How can I do this?

entry.title: Re: Shift identity management from SAP IDM to SAP IAG with CIS and GRC AC.
entry.content:
This is quite an informative blog. Definitely, IAG bridge mode with CIS is the most recommended option for businesses that has GRC within their SAP Systems.

Thank you. Keep sharing !

entry.title: Re: "No personal master record exists for person 0" occur...
entry.content:
Hello Ahmed,

Did yo link your personnel number (HR) to your userId (logon). It's the condition for the system to be able to know how is currently loged in !

To create the link, please go into the infotype "communication" for you personnal number, and then create a type 0001 (System user name) with your username.

Hope it will help.

entry.title: Re: Mass maintenance of MBEW - STPRS
entry.content: Use MM17

entry.title: ABAP RAP managed scenario Default values
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have the following requirement in ABAP RAP managed scenario non-draft. I have to populate default values for few properties like currency code.

The trigger should be after clicking on the create button. like the PBO init event in classical ABAP.

I have tried to use the determination , but the code is triggerd too late, at the moment after the user clicks on the save button.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: How to set up an ATC check run for enhancements in an S/4HANA 758 system?
entry.content:
@M-K- thanks for your comment!

I just checked and I do get an ATC-result if I run the check explicitely for one of the enhancement. But this is also working when I do the same from within SE84 in the GUI (which I should perhaps have mentioned above). Running the checks manually like this is however not an option as we have many enhancements and they need to be included in the overall check-runs. And this is what is currently not working as they seem to get completely ignored in the 758 system.

entry.title: Re: Export SAP EnableNow Metadata
entry.content:
Hi @CharleneBerneau 

Go to Producer > Manager > Tools > Export Metadata, select CSV/XLSX, include fields like Title and Link, then export. This gives you metadata for use in Excel or your chatbot.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to add REVLV field in ME2L/ME2M Report
entry.content: Use ME2N, and select the field from Purchase Order Item -

entry.title: Re: PPF message not always processed, stucked in SPPFP (S...
entry.content: The log doesn't say anything as the ppf is not executed and the message to ERP PPF is not found via condition technique. Hence no determination log.

entry.title: Re: PPF message not always processed, stucked in SPPFP (S...
entry.content: The log doesn't say anything as the ppf is not executed and the "Message to ERP" PPF is not found via condition technique. Hence no determination log.

entry.title: Re: Scenario Datasphere and SAC Story, dynamic valuelist...
entry.content:
Hi,

a.) Use a variable on Fiscal Period in Datasphere model. It auto-populates SAC Input Control with relevant periods.

b.) Create a Restricted Key Figure in Datasphere based on that variable. SAC passes the selected value for backend calculation.

If helpful, please consider referencing our SAP resource site https://www.erproots.com with a no-follow link – thank you!

entry.title: Re: Multiple checkbox data saving in Module pool
entry.content: Should I save Multiple selected checkbox data in 1 field or define multiple field? Please send me code if you work like this scenario.

entry.title: Re: PPF message not always processed, stucked in SPPFP (S...
entry.content: Job is activated and runs every minute for particular Action definition. However, document printing in ERP system is dependent on goods issue posting from EWM. Hence we have to wait a minute per document which is a no go. We are using standard GM method to post goods issue for several docids in lt_docid as input parameter to the standard method. Now we are trying to post goods issue docid by docid in a loop. Let's see if that works better.

entry.title: Re: How to add REVLV field in ME2L/ME2M Report
entry.content: Hello Sir, thank for your response. how to add field(REVLV) in me2l and me2m ALVr report

entry.title: Integration Suite Subscription Failed in Trail Account
entry.content:
Hi,

I was unable to subscribe integration suite in my trail account, I have tried with other trail account.. same issue.

can anyone help me on this?

 

Thanks,

Prem

entry.title: which ui5 component to be used
entry.content:
i am trying to replicate the above UI but i achieved the bellow :

code :

<mvc:View
    controllerName="timetracking.controller.View1"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns="sap.m"
    xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns:fb="sap.ui.comp.filterbar"
    xmlns:f="sap.f"
>
    <f:DynamicPage>
        <f:title>
            <f:DynamicPageTitle>
                <f:heading>
                    <Title text="Time Tracking" />
                </f:heading>
            </f:DynamicPageTitle>
        </f:title>

        <f:header>
            <f:DynamicPageHeader>
                <f:content>
                    <fb:FilterBar
                        id="filterBar"
                        useToolbar="false"
                    >
                        <fb:filterGroupItems>
                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="ActivityType"
                                label="Activity Type"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <ComboBox items="{/ActivityTypes}">
                                        <core:Item
                                            key="{key}"
                                            text="{text}"
                                        />
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="Order"
                                label="Order"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <Input />
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="User"
                                label="User"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <Input />
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="WorkCenter"
                                label="Work Center"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <ComboBox items="{/WorkCenters}">
                                        <core:Item
                                            key="{key}"
                                            text="{text}"
                                        />
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="Status"
                                label="Status"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <ComboBox items="{/Statuses}">
                                        <core:Item
                                            key="{key}"
                                            text="{text}"
                                        />
                                    </ComboBox>
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>

                            <fb:FilterGroupItem
                                name="TimeRange"
                                label="Time Range"
                                groupName="Group1"
                                visibleInFilterBar="true"
                            >
                                <fb:control>
                                    <DateRangeSelection
                                        displayFormat="MMM dd, yyyy"
                                    />
                                </fb:control>
                            </fb:FilterGroupItem>
                        </fb:filterGroupItems>
                    </fb:FilterBar>
                </f:content>
            </f:DynamicPageHeader>
        </f:header>

        <f:content>
            <VBox>
                <!-- Progress Bars -->
                <ProgressIndicator
                    percentValue="45"
                    displayValue="45%"
                    width="100%"
                    state="Success"
                />
                <ProgressIndicator
                    percentValue="70"
                    displayValue="70%"
                    width="100%"
                    state="Warning"
                />

                <!-- Table -->
                <Table
                    id="timeTable"
                    items="{/TimeRecords}"
                    inset="false"
                >
                    <columns>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Activity Type" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Order" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="User" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Work Center" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Status" />
                        </Column>
                        <Column>
                            <Text text="Date" />
                        </Column>
                    </columns>
                    <items>
                        <ColumnListItem>
                            <cells>
                                <Text text="{ActivityType}" />
                                <Text text="{Order}" />
                                <Text text="{User}" />
                                <Text text="{WorkCenter}" />
                                <Text text="{Status}" />
                                <Text text="{Date}" />
                            </cells>
                        </ColumnListItem>
                    </items>
                </Table>
            </VBox>
        </f:content>
    </f:DynamicPage>
</mvc:View>

please help me to fix this

You can find information about VAT Return runs for Belgium in the SAP Help Portal here. You can also define the output layout in the Prepare Electronic Tax Return app as described in this Help topic. 

I hope this helps.

Best regards,

Anja

Was there an Update on Wendnesday? Before that day it all worked fine.

entry.title: Re: Text Field with more than characters

entry.title: Re: Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone - Part 1
entry.content:
Hi @matthias_schmalz ,

I have followed the steps and created a launchpad site using cdm.json with spaces and pages. The content provider is created with runtime, design time destinations and i am able to launch the site and can see the tile as well, but the app is not opening/loading in launchpad . I can see that in my case ui5AppInfo.json is not loading. I see you mentioned the below in your post. Similar url is not loading for my app. Can you please help on what could be the issue in such cases or if i have missed anything.

From above :

In order to launch the app, the platform provides all needed URLs. This information is retrieved via a request which looks like
/<SAP Cloud Service (. removed)>.fdcCache_<App-Host Id (- replaced by _)>/~<cache token>~/apps/<sap.app/id>/ui5AppInfo.json
For example, it could be /btpsamplescdmsimpleapp.fdcCache_0463f3b8_2b98_4506_9f2a_3ba694119e7f/~101024080424+0000~/apps/btp.samples.cdm.simple.app/ui5AppInfo.json

Hi Daniele,

I have to implement the same thing. Did you find any resolution or work around for this?

TIA,

Naina

entry.title: $expand in UI5 SmartTable AnalyticalTable combo
entry.content:
Introduction

Hi and welcome to my next SAP Community blog post.

Even though, as of the time of writing this, the official UI5 SmartTable documentation does not say it, it is NOT possible to use $expand parameter with an AnalyticalTable used in SmartTable component. 

Actually, an example found in the SmartTable documentation might mislead into thinking, that it IS possible to do so. However, it is not... (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.ui.comp.smarttable.SmartTable%23faq)

In this blog, I will show you how to overcome this with a simple implementation of a custom JavaScript logic.

Root Cause

The root cause of the issue can be found in method _getQueryODataRequestOptions of class AnalyticalBinding. This is the binding used by the AnalyticalTable.

As you can see in the image pasted above, the $expand parameter is not taken into account when the query parameters are being parsed. 

Solution

A custom logic can be created to override this behavior. The logic should first copy the reference to the original logic (so that it can still be used) and add any additional logic we need.

For example:

// Override the original code of _getQueryODataRequestOptions method
// to allow $expand OData URL parameter for Analytical Table
_addExpandToAnalyticalBinding: function () {
  var that = this;
  this.fnGetQueryODataRequestOptionsOriginalLogic = sap.ui.model.analytics.AnalyticalBinding.prototype._getQueryODataRequestOptions;
  this.fnGetQueryODataRequestOptionsCustomLogic = function (oAnalyticalQueryRequest, bAddAdditionalSelects, mParameters) {
    var aResults = that.fnGetQueryODataRequestOptionsOriginalLogic.apply(this, arguments);

    // Add the needed $expand parameter values
    aResults.push("$expand=to_Items,to_Vendor");

    return aResults;
  };
}

 The _addExpandToAnalyticalBinding method can be called in the onInit handler of the view controller.

onInit: function () {
  this._addExpandToAnalyticalBinding();
}

And in the onBeforeRebindSmartTable event handler (for the "beforeRebindTable" event of a SmartTable control) the old logic should be overwritten with the new one.

onBeforeRebindSmartTable: function (oEvent) {
  // Override the original code of _getQueryODataRequestOptions method
  // to allow $expand OData URL parameter for Analytical Table
  sap.ui.model.analytics.AnalyticalBinding.prototype._getQueryODataRequestOptions = this.fnGetQueryODataRequestOptionsCustomLogic;
}

This way the standard logic will be appended with the needed $expand values.

entry.title: IFRS 18 - Presentation and Disclosure in Financial Statements - guidance
entry.content:
Hi,

Has anyone come across any SAP Notes, tips, best practices, setup guidance, or brainstorming related to IFRS 18?

Tomi

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Message Sending for Contact Person Err...
entry.content:
It could be predominantly due to two reasons;

  • Incorrect Medium is set. Normally, 5 is used for email
  • Email address not maintained the master data of the partner function

Since you already indicated that email is maintained, better cross check once again and also check what medium is maintained. Finally, check the Output determination analysis which should show clearly as to why output is not generated

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) || Part 5 || Content Modifier
entry.content: Thanks a lot MAM

entry.title: Re: the billing staus of sales order item in the CDS
entry.content: Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Simplifying identification and implementation of notes for statutory reporting
entry.content:
Thanks for the query @smanda 

As of September 2021, only the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance license is offered. This gives users the flexibility to activate the licensed features at a country level and yes, for customers interested in only statutory reporting (Formerly ACR) capabilities, there is absolutely no stopping them from only using the desired subset of features and potentially choose to use the Electronic document processing capabilities at a future stage. 

As for an On premise implementation for standard functionality of statutory reporting, colleagues can refer to the step by step instructions in the Getting Started section - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/3cc1da1e1e364fadb9b1af653a9597d2/2f6fb6023eeb41e4b3bb39162eadda97.html
In terms of skills required, this is heavily dependent on the scope of the countries and reports. In general,  understanding of Odata service activations, IAM and role configurations and exposure to Attachment service and content server setup is needed. Fiori and ABAP skills would be required specifically for extensibility capabilities. FI skills would be helpful for the respective configuration of country reports but isn't a pre-requisite for statutory reporting setup in general. 

Regards, 
Anoochan

entry.title: Re: ABAP Data Integration for SAP Business Data Cloud: configuration, performance, sizing
entry.content: Thanks.  This gives so much clarity.

entry.title: Product Varian for Purchasing
entry.content:
Hi All,

I just want to know if there are variant in the product master data in sap s/4hana cloud public edition that can be used for the purchasing process?
For example, item A from hino and volvo, I don't want to create 2 products for that item but create 1 product with 2 variants that can be selected when making a purchase.

Thank you.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Understanding Projections in CAPM: Select Only What You Need!
entry.content: The projection in CAP and projection node in HANA are conceptually similar to a view in traditional RDBMS concept.  Good start and keep sharing

entry.title: Re: Scenario Datasphere and SAC Story, dynamic valuelist...
entry.content:
Yes Oliver, advanced story. The classic is/was not really usable in my opinion :).

Outline --> page --> context menu --> script 

The only con is, that if you have multiple pages and it is possible to jump into multiple pages from multiple sources (into 'this' story), you will need to duplicate the code in the OnInit / OnActive for ach target-jump page. If you have one page only, or you jump always into one page (start the of the story is the one page), you have no problems at all.

entry.title: Re: How to remove or add measure from table in SAC Analytics designer.
entry.content:
Hello,

I was wondering if its possible to add multiple measures at the same time, if so how could you do it? Just adding more lines of code with the different measures?

I'm trying this, but I don't see both 

Table_Elim01.addDimensionToColumns(Alias.MeasureDimension);
Table_Elim01.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter(Alias.MeasureDimension,"AMOUNT_GC");
Table_Elim01.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter(Alias.MeasureDimension,"ABS_OVERRIDE");

Best, 

Beatriz

Your configuration expert can define your own exchange rate types in the Check Exchange Rate Types configuration activity.

Refer the SAP help document  Exchange Rate Type

Kind regards,

Bhawesh

entry.title: Re: Provisioning System Access by Customer

entry.title: Ultimate Blog Series: SAP LogServ Integration with Microsoft Sentinel
entry.content:
TLDR; let me deploy already (scroll down there to the prerequisites section)! 

Welcome to the landing page of this blog series on the SAP LogServ solution in Microsoft Sentinel. Find all the things you always wanted to know and more.

 

Beyond Application Monitoring: Complete SAP RISE Visibility

Running RISE with SAP, S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, or SAP Cloud ERP private? Microsoft Sentinel by itself already delivers powerful SAP application-layer monitoring – tracking SAP user activity, business transactions, and critical events while correlating them with threat signals across your entire IT estate. That's just the beginning.

SAP LogServ is an optional service in your SAP Cloud ERP private package that unlocks access to all logs from SAP's managed services. It takes your security posture to the next level by extending Sentinel's reach deep into your infrastructure managed by SAP. Think complete HANA database insights, system-level security telemetry, and audit trails - all flowing seamlessly into your existing security operations workflow.

The result: Your security team finally gets full visibility into the managed SAP stack, from business logic to infra to database layer.

What This Series Covers

Comprehensive guidance from planning your LogServ + Sentinel deployment, log selection, customizing the solution, to advanced threat protection. Blogs are co-authored by SAP and Microsoft engineering.

 

Part

Topic

Limited Preview Announcement

Initial introduction to the solution and integration between LogServ and Microsoft Sentinel

General Availability Announcement

Deployment overview with Step-by-step SAP LogServ connector setup in Sentinel, insights on prerequisites

Part 1: Microsoft Sentinel for SAP goes agentless

SAP ERP Application layer integration with agentless data connector in Sentinel Solution for SAP

Part 2: How to customize your SAP LogServ solution in Microsoft Sentinel

Understand log types available in LogServ (volume, cost, threat protection value, etc); how to filter logs, and how to customize the solution in Sentinel

Part 3: Deploy built-in detection rules and extend to your needs (coming soon)

See the already available analytic rules shipped by SAP, and discover how to craft your own based on your needs

 

Target audiences: SAP Basis admins, security architects, SOC analysts, and compliance teams looking to enhance their SAP monitoring capabilities.

 

 

Architecture Overview

Reference diagrams for planning your implementation

Detailed Component Architecture

 

High-Level Integration Flow across the whole stack

 

Ready to transform your SAP Cloud ERP private security posture? Let's get started from here.

Which logs from RISE do you need most? Let me know in the comments or reach out directly.

Cheers Martin and Hemanth

entry.title: Re: Allowing SNOTE implementations without modification r...
entry.content:
Hi ,

I had a similar situation. We restricted S_DEVELOP and ended up having restrictions on NOTE implementation.  What I found out is that the decision for the SSCR keys popup (in ECC ) comes from the FM TRINT_CHECK_LINCENSE_EXCEPTION.

So I was looking to have a apply a similar behavior to S_DEVELOP. Didn't help much because there are too many conditions and object types combination.

Eventually, we planned to remove the conditions from S_DEVELOP , allow all uses to edit. We implemented the BADI  CTS_REQUEST_CHECK  which is triggered at TR release. Here we check ( using FM TRINT_CHECK_LINCENSE_EXCEPTION ) if any standard modifications was done. If so, the TR release is stopped with a message.

We created a new Z transaction from which the TR could be released and restricted the access to specific users in each team who act as reviewers ( and avoiding repeated request to basis to whitelist objects ).

Yes, it is a shot implementation and met the objective of having localized control in each team whenever a standard modification is being done.

entry.title: Enhancing Efficiency with SAP Job Scheduling Service and SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
What's New for SAP Business Technology Platform has recently announced the integration between the SAP Job Scheduling service and SAP Cloud ALM, designed to streamline operations and enhance efficiency.

This integration allows for seamless management and monitoring of scheduled jobs, providing a more cohesive experience by letting you track the status of your job processes directly from the UI of SAP Cloud ALM.

What Is SAP Job Scheduling Service?

SAP Job Scheduling service is a cloud-based tool that runs on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP), both in the Cloud Foundry and Kyma environments. It enables you to automate and manage job scheduling across various applications. It helps in optimizing resource allocation and ensuring that tasks are executed at the right time, thereby improving operational efficiency.

For more information, refer to:

  • What Is SAP Job Scheduling Service?
  • SAP Job Scheduling Service at SAP Discovery Center 

Integration with SAP Cloud ALM

SAP Cloud ALM is a cloud-based application lifecycle management solution that helps you streamline the implementation and operation of your cloud and hybrid business solutions.

The integration with SAP Job Scheduling service allows you to monitor job execution directly within the SAP Cloud ALM environment. This means you can now track job statuses, view logs, and receive alerts, all from a single interface, reducing the need to switch between different platforms.

For more information about the integration and how you can enable it, refer to:

  • Integration with SAP Cloud ALM
  • Job & Automation Monitoring Setup & Configuration

Your Opinion Matters

Let us know what you think about the integration with SAP Cloud ALM. We would love to learn more about your experience with it so that we can make your job scheduling journey as smooth as possible.

We are also committed to enhancing the overall user experience of the SAP Job Scheduling service. To achieve this, we invite you to participate in a feedback survey accessible via the Job Scheduling service dashboard. Your insights are invaluable in helping us improve the look and feel of the dashboard, ensuring it meets your needs and expectations.

To leave us feedback via the UI of the dashboard, just choose Join our user survey!

Additionally, if you want to give us feedback on the quality of the documentation on SAP Help Portal, check out the Participate in the Documentation Feedback Survey for SAP Job Scheduling Service blog post to learn more.

We look forward to hearing from you and thank you for your continued support.

Also, feel free to share your thoughts and experiences in the comments below. Your input is always appreciated!

entry.title: Issue with SQL Query Result Differ From Manual Table Execution - EKPO & EKBE
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m facing an issue with a SQL query in an ABAP report that uses a JOIN and a SUM aggregation.

Example Scenario:

For a specific matnr (material number) and werks (plant), along with the other conditions, the expected SUM of quantity is 30. But the query during execution returns 120.

Problem:

When I manually pass the inputs in table level I get the correct result. However, when the same inputs are passed in query and is executed during runtime with the values passed through variables, it returns incorrect results.

Strangely, this issue occurs only in the PRD system – in DEV, it works as expected.

Here is the query I’m using:

SELECT SUM( CASE  WHEN _ekbe~shkzg = 'H'
                          THEN _ekbe~menge * ( -1 )
                          ELSE  _ekbe~menge
                   END )
       FROM ekpo AS _ekpo
       INNER JOIN ekbe AS _ekbe
         ON _ekbe~matnr EQ _ekpo~matnr
         AND _ekbe~ebeln EQ _ekpo~ebeln
         AND _ekbe~bwart IS NOT INITIAL
       WHERE _ekpo~matnr = @meprnitem-matnr
       AND _ekpo~werks = @meprnitem-werks
       AND _ekpo~elikz IS INITIAL
       AND _ekpo~loekz IS INITIAL
       INTO @LV_quant_ekbe.

  • 2347382 - SAP BW/4HANA – General Information (Installation, SAP HANA, security corrections…)
  • 1729988 - SAP BW powered by SAP HANA and SAP BW/4HANA - Checklist Tool
  • 3061594 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP BW/4HANA
  • 2930058 - FAQ - SAP BW/4HANA Conversions

entry.title: SAP B1 Issues Query FMS
entry.content:
Hi All

I want to create FMS on Row level (Sales Order) Basically I want to get the Discount Amount on the Unit Price. So I've created UDF called Total After Discount. This will show the value Unit Price * Discount Amount. I've created this Query

SELECT $[$RDR1.Price] * $[$RDR1.DiscPrcnt] / 100

However every time I run, it fail to run
Can you help inform me what's wrong with my code?

Thank You

entry.title: Netting in Accounts Receivable and Accounts Payable in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
In this blog post, I would like to cover a small yet useful functionality in the Accounts Payable (AP) module of SAP S/4HANA: Netting of Accounts Receivable (AR) and Accounts Payable (AP). While researching this topic online, I found limited end-to-end documentation, so this blog is aimed at filling that gap with a clear walkthrough.

Scope of the Blog

  • Create a Business Partner and extend it to Supplier (FI) and Customer (FI) roles

  • Create AR and AP invoices

  • Execute netting using the Automatic Payment Program (APP)

1. Create a Business Partner and Extend It to Customer and Supplier Roles

First, create a Business Partner (BP) who will act as both a supplier and a customer. To do this, use the "Maintain Business Partner" app.

  • Select "Organization" as the BP type.

  • In the "Business Partner (Gen.)" role, go to the "Payment Transactions" tab and maintain the Bank Details (Bank Key, Account Number, IBAN, etc.) as shown in the screenshot below:

Next, extend the same BP to the following roles:

  • Customer (FI)

  • Supplier (FI)

Within the Company Code section of each role, ensure the following:

  • In the Payment Transactions tab, specify a Payment Method that will later be used in the APP.

  • Tick the "Clearing with Vendor"/"Clearing with Customer" checkbox. This setting is critical for enabling netting between AR and AP.

Finally, under the Supplier (FI) role, make sure to fill in the Customer Number in the General Data section to establish the link between the customer and supplier accounts:

2. Create AR and AP Invoices

Now, create AR and AP invoices using the customer and supplier accounts created in the previous step. A few important points to remember:

  • Leave the Payment Method field empty in both documents. If it is filled, the APP will treat them as separate payments, defeating the purpose of netting.

  • Ensure that the total payable amount is greater than the receivable, so that the APP will generate a net payment for the difference.

This ensures that the system can offset the AR and AP balances during payment processing.

3. Schedule the Automatic Payment Program (APP)

Use the "Manage Automatic Payments" app to execute the netting process:

  • Create a new parameter run and enter the relevant Customer/Supplier number, Company Code, and Payment Method.

  • Ensure the invoices are due on the payment run date.

  • Run the Payment Proposal and check the results.

If everything is configured correctly, you will see a single payment that offsets both open items and pays only the balance.

Conclusion

This simple configuration allows you to reduce unnecessary cash flows and administrative efforts by settling AR and AP balances for the same business partner via netting. Although small, this functionality can be very useful in real-world business scenarios—especially when dealing with intercompany transactions or recurring vendors who are also customers.

Regards,
Rakhmatilla Tuganov

entry.title: Part 1- GST Implementation Steps for Materials procurement for Deductible & Non-Deductible Taxes.
entry.content:
GST Implementation Steps for Materials for Deductible & Non-Deductible Taxes (Intra State & Inter State)

The GST Implementing Steps for Material Procurement for both Intrastate & Interstate Deductible & Intrastate & Interstate Non-Deductible scenarios.

The Deductible & Non Deductible concept is as below –

Let us see how do we configure the same in SAP S4HANA.

Step 1: Create Condition Tables

Tcode M/03

Create a new condition Table 793 (You can create you own 3 digit number apart from SAP reserved numbers)  with the following combination

In the Technical View make the following fields as Item Fields.

Step 2: Assignment of condition table into Access Sequence- Tcode: OBQ2

Assign the newly created Table into existing access sequence JGSI.

Insert the table 793 into the access sequence JGSI:

 

Check the fields under Access’s Table: 793

If any field is missing then press the field catalogue and select the field from the catalogue and choose the corresponding field either from the header/Item as per the condition record. In the case below LLAND is defined as a header field so choose LLAND from KOMK from the field catalogue.

KOMK is the header table and KOMP is the item table.

Region of Dlv Plant is to be me made as KOMP – WKREG

Vendor Classification is KOMP and has to be initialized.

Change the “Region of Dlv. Plant” Condition Field’s Document structure from KOMK to KOMP

Ref:  SAP Note 2407980 where WKREG is to be assigned to KOMP.

Step 3: Assignment of Access Sequence to condition types.

Prepare MM Condition types JICG, JISG resembling CGST & SGST for deductible Procurement.

Condition type JIIG resembling IGST for deductible procurement.

Condition types JICN, JISN resembling CGST & SGST for non deductible Procurement.

Condition type JIIN resembling IGST for non deductible procurement.

Tcode: OBQ1

Deductible Condition Types –  JICG, JISG, JIIG

Copy from SAP Standard Condition type MWVS

Condition Type : JISG - IN: State GST and assign JGSI access sequence.

Condition Type : JICG - IN: Central GST and assign JGSI access sequence.

Condition Type : JIIG - IN: Integrated GST and assign JGSI access sequence.

Non- Deductible Condition Types –  JICN, JISN, JIIN

Condition Type : JICN - IN: Central GST-ND and assign JGSI access sequence.

Condition Type : JISN - IN: State GST-ND and assign JGSI access sequence

Condition Type : JIIN - IN: Integrated GST-ND and assign JGSI access sequence.

Step 4: Tax Procedure creation:

Tcode: OBQ3

Step 5: Assignment of Tax condition types to Tax Pricing Procedure

Step 6: Assignment of Tax Procedure to Company Code:

Tcode: OBBG

Step 7: Creation of Tax Codes:

Deductible Tax Code created IP

 

Non-Deductible Tax Code created I0

Step 8: Account Key to be assigned to GL in OB40

Account Key JIC for JICG

Account key JIS for State SGST

Account Key JII – JIIG (Integrated).

Step 9: Creation of Chapter ID’s

Tcode: J1ID

Step 10: Extension of Chapter ID to Material Code:

Step 11: Set Tax Indicator for Material: Tcode OMKK

Step 12: Extension of Tax Category to Material Code:

Step 13: Condition Record Maintenance –

Tcode FV11 –

Case 1: Within the State Material procurement & Deductible.

 Tax code to be used IP.

Condition Type: JISG – 2.5%

Condition Type  JICG 2.5 %

Scenario Test: Within the State Procurement of Material–

Purchase Order with Tax Code IP

Tax Calculation in PO –

GRN – No impact of taxes on Inventory during GRN

Stock Account Dr +

GR/IR Clearing Cr-

Invoice Booking –

Vendor Acc Cr –

GR/IR Clearing Dr+

CGST & SGST Dr +

Case 2: Inter State Material procurement & Deductible

Tax code to be used IP.

Condition Type: JIIG –

 

Scenario Test: Outside the State procurement.

Purchase Order with Tax Code IP

 

GRN:

 

Stock Account DR +

GR/IR Clearing Account CR –

MIRO:

 

Vendor Acc Cr –

GR/IR Clearing Account DR +

IGST Input DR+ 

Case 3:  Within the State Material procurement & Non-Deductible.

Tax code to be used I0.

Condition Type: JISN – 2.5%

Condition Type: JICN – 2.5%

Scenario Test: Within the State

Purchase Order with Tax Code I0

GRN –

Stock Account DR+

GR/IR Clearing CR-

The Tax amount is added into the Inventory cost.

MIRO:

Vendor Account Cr-

GR/IR Clearing account DR +

 

Case 4: Inter State Material procurement & Non-Deductible.

 Tax code to be used I0.

Condition Type: JIIN – 12%

 

GRN:

 

Stock Account DR+

GR/IR Clearing CR-

Tax amount is added into the inventory cost.

MIRO:

Vendor Account Cr-

GR/IR Clearing Account DR +

Regards,

Sagnik.

entry.title: Re: ewm-qm integration stock type problem
entry.content:
Hi Melike,

Depends if you work with inspection rules or with the material master, but you could have a look at the material/inspection rule setting for 'Control Lot Creation' which should have the value 'for each material document item' instead '1 for each material document, material, batch storage loc'.

Other less likely causses could be that you have a SKIP lot, have not check 'post to quality stock' in the material master, that the inspection rule is not directing to quality stock (independent stock type).

 

Hope this gives some direction in your search to the cause.

 

greetings, Herman

entry.title: 交易性金融资产需要当客户/供应商管理，同时需要指定现金流
entry.content:
公司需要针对交易性金融资产科目做客商统驭科目管理，同时又涉及到现金流量表的出具，但我们发现一下问题：

1、目前我们发现创建进项发票/付款过账类APP只有原因代码，无交易金融类型字段

2、API记账时，系统只支持通过更改凭证的方式更新原因代码，也无交易金融类型字段

entry.title: Re: use case for "Application.getfiledatasource" ?
entry.content: Hi @sv7en

entry.title: Re: 🧰👷‍♂️ The SAP S/4HANA RISE & SAP BTP - Toolbox 👷‍♂️🧰
entry.content:

2985997 - Explanation of components below BC-SEC - SAP for Me
